title: Same TDS appears in both 26AS and Form 16 — Form 16 is corroborating, not a second credit
notes: The Form 16 TDS entry and the 26AS entry refer to the same TDS deduction. Only the 26AS entry can be claimed as a credit (Section 199). Form 16 confirms that the deduction was made — it is a verification source, not an independent credit. Total TDS credit = ₹28,600, not ₹57,200.
